title: cynometra trinitensis
intro: Cynometra trinitensis, also known as the Trinidad copal tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to Trinidad and Tobago and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cynometra trinitensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from pain and swelling. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves extracting its bark or leaves in the form of a decoction or infusion, which can be used to treat various ailments.
